description_long: This object is a large solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a prominent array of solar panels mounted on a robust support structure. The panels are arranged in a single, continuous row, elevated above a base that appears to house electrical or mechanical components. The base structure is rectangular and features a patterned surface, possibly for ventilation or access, and is flanked by additional platforms or walkways. The main support frame is constructed from metal beams, providing stability and durability for the solar array. The overall design suggests it is intended for ground installation in an urban or industrial setting, with ample space for maintenance access. The color scheme is predominantly black and gray, with some lighter accents on the base.
description: A large, ground-mounted solar panel array on a sturdy metal frame with a patterned base and side platforms, primarily in black and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the solar panel array head-on, with the patterned base and support structure clearly visible beneath the panels.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the length of the solar array and the extended base platform, highlighting the structural supports and the overall elongated shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the solar panels and the base, with visible support beams and the patterned surface extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the full span of the solar array and the base, showing the arrangement of the support structure and platforms.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with a metal (likely aluminum and steel) frame
attribute_array_configuration: single linear row of approximately 10-12 panels
